reviews.comment:
Hermoso recreo muy londo lugar para descansar despuede de manejar. Hermoso lugar para comer o desayunar recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful recreation area, a very nice place to relax, but it's hard to drive. A lovely place to eat or have breakfast, highly recommended.

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada para almorzar en ruta 2. Hay  comidas rápidas, kiosco, sanitarios y lugar arbolado para descanso

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop for lunch on Route 2. There are fast food restaurants, a kiosk, restrooms, and a wooded area to rest.
